enrichment.summary: Kyle wakes up and recaps the previous day's work on his ski resorts website, then explains he got sidetracked by his Google Earth project. He announces he's renaming the project from 'Fantasylandia' to 'Boulder Rome' — a virtual recreation of Rome set in Boulder — and plans to work on it full-time today, possibly publishing it to his website.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Excited to develop it and make it publicly available on his website
Prefers 'Boulder Rome' as more original and descriptive since Fantasylandia already exists
Thinks it's something you can do really well while high, gets good ideas

More original, but also descriptive of reality, you know, so I'll call it Boulder Rome. Boulder
Rome. Because what it is, is it's Rome created in Boulder. Boulder Rome. Duh. So that's what I'm
